Among the offers, you can find the newest XPress2 Long-Range Step-Thru Cruiser e-bike with $385 in FREE gear at $1,399 shipped, as well as the alternate XPress2 Long-Range High-Step Commuter e-bike with the same bundle at $1,399 shipped. Having just launched in May, these two models would normally run you $1,784 were it not for the discounts on the FREE bundled gear, which beats out the $336 launch and $286 Father’s Day bundles that came before. Head below to learn more about this new series and browse the full lineup of deals while they last through the 4-day savings event.

items.title: EcoFlow expands Prime Day Sale with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus savings, FREE gifts, 3x credits, more – all from $142
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day event, EcoFlow has officially launched its full Prime Day Sale lineup with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, FREE gifts, and 3x EcoCredit rewards. You can find major deals beating out most of the 2026 sale prices we’ve seen, like the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station that gets a FREE 170W 25K power bank at $1,519.05 shipped, after using the sitewide code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, beating out the station-only Amazon offer by $65. Down from $3,699 directly, since mid-January we haven’t seen much change in price on this model, with it having jumped up to $1,599 until March when it began bouncing between $1,899 and $1,699, with occasional spikes as high as $2,599. Now, not only are you getting much more savings ($1,080 off the going rate, $2,180 off the MSRP) to the second-best price of 2026, but you also get a free RAPID 170W 25K power bank at no extra cost ($80 value). Head below to get the rundown on all the Prime Day promotions and to browse the full lineup of deals.

It’s dropping down from its new $2,499 MSRP since the brand made permanent price cuts in May (originally $4,799), which we’ve seen go as low as $2,199 since it hit the market in early 2025. Now, during this event, it’s not only starting off priced lower than ever, but with the bonus savings code you’re getting a combined $514 markdown off the new going rate ($2,814 off the original MSRP) for a new all-time low price. items.title: Power and value-packed 130W 8-in-1 USB-C charging station hits $28 for Prime Day
items.summary:
TESSAN 130W 8-in-1 USB-C Charging Station

Buy for $28 (Reg. $35)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

The value here is pretty obvious if you ask me, an 8-in-1 power strip with up to 130W of output for $28? That’s pretty impressive. Onboard you’ll find three Type-C ports, two USB-A, as well as three AC outlets.

items.title: Give your office executive vibes with this new-release chair down at $140
items.summary:
Marsail Executive Office Chair

Buy for $140 (Reg. $180)

What we love

This recently-released office chair dials up the look most of us are used to seeing. It swaps out the usual casual look for a more sophisicated vibe, and I’m a fan. When I get an office chair next time, I’ll be on the lookout for a style like this.

items.title: I’ve been logging my weight in Apple Health for years, get started today with this $19 scale
items.summary:
RENPHO Apple Health-ready Smart Scale

Buy for $19 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

When Apple Health-compatible smart scales first hit the scene, I quickly hopped on the bandwagon. Fast forward to today and I now have years and years of data I can use to keep tabs on changes in my weight, BMI, and more. If you don’t have one, I recommend picking one up sooner rather than later.

items.title: Tight space? This flat wall charger with 65W USB-C is only $10.50 right now
items.summary:
TESSAN Flat 65W USB-C Wall Charger

Buy for $10.50 (Reg. $17)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

A lot of wall charger protrude from the wall quite a bit and then you still have to plug in a cable that juts out even further. This offering takes a different approach with a flat design that sends USB-A and Type-C ports downward. The Type-C port can reach up to 65W, making it suitable for smartphones, tablets, laptops, and more.
